title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Parsley essential oils helps with oily hair because of its natural antifungal and antibacterial properties, which help to regulate the scalp's natural oil production. The oil's astringent qualities also help to dry out excess oil, reducing greasiness and leaving hair feeling clean and refreshed. Additionally, parsley essential oil's ability to stimulate blood flow to the scalp can help to unclog pores, further reducing oil buildup and promoting healthier, more balanced hair growth....
